zh.lifeSummary: 當Rainald I von Geldern於1255年7月9日出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德時，他的父親Otto II. von Geldern40歲，母親Philippe de Dammartin42歲。他和van Steenbergen至少有1個兒子。他去世於1326年10月9日在荷蘭利包格蒙福爾享年71歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福可列福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rainald I von Geldern于1255年7月9日出生在荷兰蓋爾德藍德时，他的父亲Otto II. von Geldern40岁，母亲Philippe de Dammartin42岁。他和van Steenbergen至少有1个儿子。他去世于1326年10月9日在荷兰利包格蒙福爾享年71岁，埋葬在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福可列福。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Geldern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northern England usually a variant of Geldard, an occupational name from Middle English gelde ‘sterile, barren’, used as a noun to denote ‘gelded cattle’, + Old English hierde, hence ‘herdman who tends the gelded cattle’.
English: alternatively, perhaps an occupational name from Middle English gelder(e) ‘gelder, castrator (of livestock)’.

variants.name: Gilder
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): occupational name for a goldsmith or gilder, from Middle English gilder, gelder, guldar, a derivative of Old English gyldan ‘to gild’.

nameMeanings.name: Rainald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Raghnall
meanings: Gaelicized borrowing of Old Norse Rögnvaldr, a compound of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’.

en.lifeSummary: When Rainald I von Geldern was born on 9 July 1255, in Zutphen, Gelderland, Netherlands, his father, Otto II. von Geldern, was 40 and his mother, Philippe de Dammartin, was 42. He had at least 1 son with van Steenbergen. He died on 9 October 1326, in Montfort, Limburg, Netherlands, at the age of 71, and was buried in Cleves, Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rainald I von Geldern est né le 9 juillet 1255, à Zutphen, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, son père, Otto II. von Geldern, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Philippe de Dammartin, avait 42 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec van Steenbergen. Il est décédé le 9 octobre 1326, à Montfort, Limbourg, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rainald I von Geldern am 9. Juli 1255 in Zutphen, Geldern, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Otto II. von Geldern 40 und seine Mutter Philippe de Dammartin 42. Er hatte mit van Steenbergen mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 9. Oktober 1326 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Montfort, Limburg, Niederlande und wurde in Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rainald I von Geldern è nato il il 9 luglio 1255 nel Zutphen, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Otto II. von Geldern, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Philippe de Dammartin, aveva 42 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con van Steenbergen. Morì il 9 ottobre 1326, nel Montfort, Limburgo, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Rainald I von Geldernが1255年7月9日にオランダジェルダーランドズトフンで生まれた時，父Otto II. von Geldernは40歳，母Philippe de Dammartinは42歳であった。彼はvan Steenbergenとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1326年10月9日にオランダリンブルグモントフォートで71歳で死去し，ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブクレブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rainald I von Geldern(이)가 1255년 7월 9일 네덜란드 글델랜드 주트프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Otto II. von Geldern(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippe de Dammartin(은)는 42세였다. 그는 van Steenbergen(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1326년 10월 9일 네덜란드 림버그 몽포트에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 클브 클브에 묻혔다.

mn.9 July 1255–9. Oktober 1326: 1255 оны Долоодугаар сарын 9–1326 оны Аравдугаар сарын 9

pt.9 July 1255–9. Oktober 1326: 9 de julho de 1255–9 de outubro de 1326
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rainald I von Geldern nasceu em 9 de julho de 1255, em Zutphen, Gheldria, Países Baixos, seu pai, Otto II. von Geldern, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Philippe de Dammartin, tinha 42 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com van Steenbergen. Ele faleceu em 9 de outubro de 1326, em Montfort, Limburgo, Países Baixos, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rainald I von Geldern родился 9 июля 1255 г. в местности зутфен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Otto II. von Geldern было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippe de Dammartin, 42. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от van Steenbergen. Он умер 9 октября 1326 г. в местности монтфорт, лимбург, Нидерланды в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности клив, клив, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

sm.1271-1326: mai le 1271 e o'o I le 1326

es.9 July 1255–9. Oktober 1326: 9 de julio de 1255–9 de octubre de 1326
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rainald I von Geldern nació el 9 de julio de 1255, en Zutphen, Gelderland, Países Bajos, su papá, Otto II. von Geldern, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Philippe de Dammartin, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con van Steenbergen. Murió el 9 de octubre de 1326, en Montfort, Limburg, Países Bajos, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
